tools.Name: GenericAgent
tools.Description: A minimal, self-evolving autonomous agent framework that crystallizes execution paths into reusable skills.
tools.Use_Case: Automating system-level tasks such as web browsing, file management, and terminal operations.

tools.Name: CloakBrowser
tools.Description: A stealth-focused Chromium browser with C++ source-level patches designed to pass bot detection.
tools.Use_Case: Reliable web scraping and automation in environments with strict anti-bot systems.

tools.Name: Open WebUI
tools.Description: A user-friendly, feature-rich, self-hosted web interface for LLMs supporting RAG and multiple backends.
tools.Use_Case: Managing and interacting with local or cloud-hosted AI models through a robust GUI.
